Endo SurgeryREF: MRL-SUR-007

Conventional Cutting Surgical Needles

Unbranded · Surgical Needles

Triangular body needles with sharpened cutting edge on inside, featuring at least 2 opposing cutting edges for moderately thick tissues like skin and sternum

MaterialStainless Steel (Coated)
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Triangular body needles with sharpened cutting edge on inside, featuring at least 2 opposing cutting edges for moderately thick tissues like skin and sternum

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Conventional Cutting Surgical Needles, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Conventional Cutting Surgical Needles is constructed using Stainless Steel (Coated), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
